MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: WILLIS-MCGHEE; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA is present. Represented by PAUL LAM
Attorney, DANIEL BORENSTEIN, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, SHONTA JONES, is present.
Attorney, SHAWN T. O'LEARY, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem BILL RAUCH, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JAN-18-2010 is vacated.
